Name: Amazon
Shipping Carriers: USPS and Amazon Logistics - very rare that they used UPS

Name: ebay
Shipping Carriers: most sellers use USPS - you have to ask and communicate with the sellers, if you prefer FedEx or UPS

Name: Medicalsource
Shipping Carriers: USPS - I choose UPS, but they ignored it and used USPS

Name: Temu
Shipping Carriers: USPS - I used to able to use UPS, but they removed that option :(

Name: Walgreens
Shipping Carriers: USPS and FedEx - they do not let you choose

Name: Walmart
Shipping Carriers: walmart drivers and FedEx - 3rd party sellers mostly use USPS
